tool.name: LlamaIndex
tool.description: Agent and retrieval framework with strong indexing, data connectors, and orchestration support.
tool.logoNotes: Official LlamaIndex brand asset from the LlamaIndex brand guidelines page (`llamaindex-wordmark-black.svg`).
tool.practitionerNote: Often a pragmatic fit when retrieval and data connectors matter as much as agent logic, especially for knowledge-heavy enterprise workflows.

dataResidency.detail: Self-hosted library; operator controls data placement.

deployment.detail: pip-installed OSS framework; no managed hosting for the library.

auditLogging.detail: No native audit log; tracing/callback integrations available, operator-configured.

soc2.detail: Self-hosted library; SOC 2 applies to the operator's infrastructure, not the package.

iso27001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 27001 applies to the operator's ISMS, not the package.

iso42001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 42001 applies to the deploying organisation.

euAiAct.detail: Developer component, not an AI system placed on the market; obligations rest with the deployer.
